const data = $input.item.json; const tableRows = data.allTestCases.map(tc => { const status = (tc.status || '').toLowerCase(); const isPassed = status === 'passed'; const label = isPassed ? 'PASSED' : 'FAILED'; const color = isPassed ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'; return `${tc.title}${tc.filename}${label}`; }).join(''); const html = `

🚀 ${data.product} Automation Summary

Test Execution Report

Files
${data.totalFiles}
Passed
${data.passedCases}
Failed
${data.failedCases}
Success
${data.successRate}%

Detailed Report

${tableRows}
Test Title Source File Status
Generated by QAutoX Automation Engine on ${data.timestamp}
`; return { json: { ...data, summaryHtml: html } };
